arts.sum: Despite a shock 4-0 defeat by Leyton Orient, it's generally been a productive festive period for Barnsley, who have since won at Bolton and Peterborough. The last time the Tykes won three league game...

arts.ttl: Fans spot James McClean's classy gesture after helping Wrexham beat old club Wigan
arts.sum: There were scenes of mutual respect between Wrexham captain James McClean and his old club Wigan

arts.ttl: Wrexham boldly compared to Sir Alex Ferguson's Man Utd after late Wigan victory
arts.sum: Wrexham have made a habit of scoring late goals in recent games and Phil Parkinson has praised his side's mentality
